more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Political interference hampering enforcement of strict regulations on trucks says Transport Minister
more.description: POLITICAL connections are hindering government’s efforts to implement and enforce tighter regulations on overloaded trucks that use Zimbabwe’s main roads, Minister of Transport, Felix Mhona has said. Mhona was speaking in the National Assembly when legislators questioned him on measures being taken to address the issue of overloaded lorries plying the country’s routes. Mhona hinted [...] The post Political interference hampering enforcement of strict regulations on trucks says Transport Minister appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Veteran journalist Loughty Dube elected chairperson of regional press council
more.description: Veteran journalist Loughty Dube, who heads the Voluntary Media Council of Zimbabwe (VMCZ), has been elected inaugural chairperson of the newly formed Southern African Press Councils (SAPC), marking a significant step in regional efforts to strengthen media accountability and press freedom. Dube was elected at the body’s launch in Lusaka, where press councils and media [...] The post Veteran journalist Loughty Dube elected chairperson of regional press council appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: A ‘third term’ for Zimbabwe’s President Mnangagwa?
more.description: A controversial constitutional amendment is shaking Zimbabwe to its core. Tensions are rising and turning dangerous. Critics like Prof. Madhuku narrowly survived an attack at a political meeting, calling it a chilling sign that the country's democracy may be at its lowest point in years.

more.title: Executive Consolidation by Constitutional Disruption: The Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment Bill No.3
more.description: In February 2026, Zimbabwe gazetted Constitution Amendment Bill No. 3, a far-reaching proposal framed as a technical reform of electoral cycles and governance structures.

more.title: The Farm Eviction Scandal: Why a Former Minister Was Kicked Out of a 40-Hectare ‘Gift’
